final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing smartphone full-screen brand advertisement for OPPO Find X9 Ultra.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout simulating a smartphone screenshot, brand ad centered
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a premium brand direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-end surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Ultra" (prominent, primary)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format, full-bleed, no UI chrome or status bar visible
Avoid:
